headline: Clear calendar and no inbound fires — use today to drive the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth credentials so dashboards populate tomorrow
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken; you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics ahead of the next Agents bi-weekly TR

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the design doc for AE-1079 (Generated evaluations — clarify no ground truth)
must_make_progress.why: This is your only active Jira ticket with no due date set, and evals is a key 26.4+ deliverable called out in the Big Rock TR; getting a reviewable draft out this week keeps the stream on track

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock TR page (3/18) and update any evals-related sections with your latest thinking
must_make_progress.why: The bi-weekly cadence means the next TR is ~April 1; having your content current avoids last-minute scramble

must_communicate_with.about: Align on how no-ground-truth evals intersect with validation patterns (DeepRAG, BatchTransform) referenced in the TR
Get technical input on generated-evaluation approaches without ground truth for the design doc

must_report_status.note: Share draft link and open questions before next bi-weekly TR (~April 1)

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix or escalate to IT today.
Snowflake credentials are empty — product telemetry and MBR dashboard data inaccessible. March data update (noted in TR appendix) will be blocked.
AE-1079 has no due date set; consider assigning one this week to create accountability before the next TR.
slack_summary: Clear calendar today — best use of time is driving the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079) forward. Top two urgencies: (1) make real progress on that design doc before the next Agents bi-weekly TR, and (2) fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake auth so you regain visibility on escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today.
